items.title: Nederlander bij stuntploeg FC Noah: 'Dit is voor ons heel groot'
items.summary: FC Noah, dat donderdag stuntte tegen AZ in de Conference League, heeft met Imran Oulad Omar één Nederlander in de selectie. De 28-jarige Amsterdammer was na afloop van de wedstrijd dolblij.

items.title: Goes reageert lachend op tackle op veldbestormer: 'Ik vond het een rode kaart'
items.summary: AZ verloor donderdagavond met moeizaam spel van het Armeense FC Noah en zag het duel in de eerste helft kort worden stilgelegd door een veldbestormer. De man werd met een tackle van achter neergehaald door een beveiliger, iets waar AZ-verdediger wel om kon lachen. 'Volgens mij klapte zijn eigen enkel ook nog dubbel.'

items.title: VI Live: Stuttgart neemt afstand van Celtic in Europa League
items.summary: AZ vervolgt donderdagavond het Europese avontuur. De Alkmaarders staan in de tussenronde van de Conference League tegenover het Armeense FC Noah. Volgende week is de return in Alkmaar. Volg de heenwedstrijd in deze VI Live.

items.title: Manchester United v Atlético Madrid: Women’s Champions League playoff – live
items.summary: ⚽ Champions League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Follow us on Bluesky | You can email Sarah A great piece to read before this game begins: Here is how Arsenal booked their spot in the quarter-finals, where they will play Chelsea: Continue reading...

items.title: 19 sentenced to jail for AFCON final hooliganism
items.summary: A Moroccan court on Thursday sentenced 19 soccer fans to up to a year in prison on charges of hooliganism stemming from a chaotic Africa Cup of Nations final between Morocco and Senegal that saw supporters try to storm the field.

items.title: Madrid send UEFA evidence in Vini Jr. racism probe
items.summary: Real Madrid say they have supplied "all available evidence" to UEFA as the governing body investigates allegations of racism made by Vinícius Júnior.

items.title: Fabregas 'not proud' of incident with Milan player
items.summary: Como coach Cesc Fabregas has apologised for making contact with an AC Milan player near the touchline in Wednesday's 1-1 league draw at the San Siro.

items.title: Bukayo Saka signs new Arsenal contract to 2030
items.summary: Bukayo Saka has signed a new contract to stay at Arsenal, with sources telling ESPN it is a five-year deal.

items.title: How Premier League clubs are looking to the U.S. to bankroll big-money signings
items.summary: With tighter financial regulations and rules on sponsors coming to the Premier League, clubs need new ways to raise cash. They're looking Stateside.

items.title: Vertrouwen bij AZ na afgang in Armenië: 'Moet lukken volgende week'
items.summary: AZ leed donderdagavond een beschamende nederlaag in de tussenronde van de Conference League , maar Kees Smit maakt zich geen zorgen. Hij verwacht dat zijn ploeg de klus volgende week alsnog klaart.

items.title: Haalt Sterling bij Feyenoord zijn oude niveau? 'Hij heeft unieke eigenschappen'
items.summary: Raheem Sterling speelde zijn laatste officiële duel op 25 mei 2025, maar hoopt snel zijn voeten weer te mogen laten spreken bij Feyenoord. Zijn personal performance coach Ben Rosenblatt denkt dat de 31-jarige Engelsman in staat is om zijn oude niveau te halen. Dat heeft alles te maken met de speelstijl van Sterling, vertelde hij aan The Athletic .

items.title: Itoje condemns racist abuse suffered by Edogbo and Vinicius Jr
items.summary: England captain Maro Itoje has criticised the "corrosive" effects of social media in response to the racial abuse faced by Ireland's Edwin Edogbo following his international debut.

items.title: Ismaïla Sarr’s strike earns Crystal Palace Conference League draw at Zrinjski
items.summary: Crystal Palace’s Conference League hopes hang in the balance after a 1-1 draw against Bosnia and Herzegovina’s Zrinjski Mostar in the first leg of their knockout phase playoff. Oliver Glasner had reinforced his attacking ranks since their last European outing in December, but it was Ismaïla Sarr, assisted by the January signing Jørgen Strand Larsen, who broke the deadlock on the stroke of half-time. Continue reading...

items.title: Nottingham Forest dominate Fenerbahce to give Vítor Pereira perfect start
items.summary: For Nottingham Forest, and particularly Vítor Pereira and the 1,200 supporters who signed up to this trip to Istanbul, an evening they will not forget in a hurry. Pereira’s first match in charge could scarcely have been more impressive than the statement victory Forest recorded at Fenerbahce to put themselves in a commanding position to reach the Europa League last 16. By the end the yellow and navy stronghold had emptied and the Forest fans present savoured every moment. First they sang: “Can we play you every week?” Then a chorus of: “Where’s your famous atmosphere?” Evangelos Marinakis’s grand aim at the outset of this season, before moving on to his fourth manager since August, was to win this competition across the Bosphorus in Besiktas in May and, for all of the chaos and valid criticism, on this evidence it is very much an achievable aim. Forest are in a position of power before Fenerbahce visit for the second leg next Thursday. Continue reading...

items.title: Women's FA Cup revamp on hold after 'ridiculous idea' criticism
items.summary: Plans to change the format of the Women's FA Cup, which would have seen four sides seeded and pathways to Wembley mapped out from the last 32 onwards, will not be brought in next season.

items.title: Pereira kick-starts Forest reign in style with comfortable Fenerbahce victory
items.summary: Vitor Pereira secured the perfect start to his reign at Nottingham Forest as his side cruised to a comfortable 3-0 win against Fenerbahce in the first leg of the Europa League knockout play-off.

items.title: Sutton's predictions v Embrace bassist Steve Firth
items.summary: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on Embrace bassist Steve Firth plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.

items.title: Hearn sets out Joshua return plans
items.summary: Anthony Joshua is targeting a return to the ring in July after surviving a fatal car crash in December but will not yet be fighting Tyson Fury next, according to his promoter Eddie Hearn.

items.title: Premier League Darts LIVE! Out-of-sorts Littler THRASHED by Clayton in semi-finals
Controversial Women’s FA Cup plans on hold after pushback from clubs, players and fans
items.summary: No change next season and consultation extended ‘We have listened to the feedback,’ the FA says Proposals to make radical changes to the Women’s FA Cup, including seeding the top four teams from the WSL, have been put on hold, the Guardian can reveal, after the Football Association received negative feedback on the controversial ideas. The FA had also intended to dispense with draw ceremonies after the last 32, introducing a “road to Wembley” bracket akin to a World Cup knockout phase pathway, and review the entry tiers for lower-league sides. But it has put the brakes on its plans after concerns were raised by a significant number of clubs, fan groups and players. Continue reading...
